[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100011 3
1 000000000 a
2 111010010 5
3 111011101 7
4 110001100 4
5 111001001 5
6 010011010 4
7 000110101 4

45 54 000010000 1
56 65 000100001 2
67 76 000100011 3 match 0
70 07 000000010 1

13 31 111001001 5 match 5
